intentAnchor: A golfer should be able to open the app, understand that it helps check current golf course conditions, and start a core flow for checking whether a course or round is playable now.

aiOpinion.label: AI Opinion (interpretation, not a measured fact)
aiOpinion.intentAnchor: A golfer should be able to open the app, understand that it helps check current golf course conditions, and start a core flow for checking whether a course or round is playable now.
whyThisMayBlockCompletion: 2 network request(s) failed (a required backend host appears unreachable), which alone blocks the intended flow regardless of UI.
Console reported 2 error(s) during the flow.
No primary CTA button/link matched the intent, but an intent-relevant input (e.g. a search field) was detected — the flow may be input-driven rather than CTA-driven.
aiOpinion.recommendedFixDirection: Restore the failing backend/data requests (a required API host appears unreachable); the homepage cannot render its content or onboarding entry point until those requests succeed.

notVerified: Primary intent CTA — none matched (an intent-relevant input was detected instead).
Next-screen usability — no visual/interaction oracle in this spike.
decisionReasons: 2 backend/network request(s) failed while loading the page (e.g. a required API host is unreachable); a user cannot complete the intended flow against a broken data dependency.
limitations: Single core flow only (homepage → primary intent CTA/input → next screen).
No visual oracle: the spike confirms navigation/console/network facts but does NOT judge whether the next screen is genuinely usable.
Does not log in, does not click destructive/forbidden actions, does not bypass auth.
Not a claim that all bugs are found or that the product is complete.
